title: Rio's Sleepy Stars
synopsis: Little Rio counts sleepy stars as she gets ready for bed, with each star making a gentle sound that helps her drift off to sleep in this soothing bedtime counting adventure.

pages.text: One star says twinkle. Twinkle, twinkle!

illustration.description: Baby Rio with soft brown curls and warm brown skin sits by a large window, pointing up at one bright yellow star in the deep purple night sky. She wears cozy pink pajamas with star patterns. The room glows with gentle moonlight, and her expression shows wonder and delight.
illustration.alt: Rio pointing at one twinkling star through her bedroom window

pages.text: Two stars say shimmer. Shimmer, shimmer!

illustration.description: Rio claps her small hands together as two silver stars sparkle above her bed. Her dark eyes are bright with joy. The bedroom has soft lavender walls and a white wooden crib with a mobile. Warm yellow light creates a cozy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Rio clapping as two stars shimmer above her bed

pages.text: Three stars say whisper. Whisper, whisper!

illustration.description: Rio holds her favorite stuffed elephant close while three pale blue stars glow softly in the sky visible through sheer curtains. Her expression is becoming drowsier. The elephant is gray with pink ears, and both Rio and the toy are bathed in gentle starlight.
illustration.alt: Rio cuddling her stuffed elephant with three whispering stars

pages.text: Four stars say hush now. Hush, hush!

illustration.description: Rio's mama, a woman with long black hair and warm brown skin wearing a soft green robe, gently pats Rio's back. Four golden stars shine through the window. Rio is lying in her crib under a pastel rainbow blanket, eyes getting heavy with sleep.
illustration.alt: Mama patting Rio's back with four stars saying hush

pages.text: Five stars say sleepy. Sleep, sleep!

illustration.description: Five dreamy white stars float above Rio's crib as she snuggles deeper into her soft blankets. Her eyes are nearly closed, and a peaceful smile crosses her face. The room is dimly lit with warm amber tones, creating the perfect sleepy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Rio getting sleepy with five stars floating above

pages.text: Six stars say yawn now. Yaaawn!

illustration.description: Rio gives a big yawn, her little mouth open wide, as six cream-colored stars twinkle gently in the darkening sky. Her stuffed elephant lies beside her pillow. The window shows a peaceful night scene with a crescent moon peeking through soft clouds.
illustration.alt: Rio yawning with six stars twinkling outside

pages.text: Seven stars say quiet. Shh, shh!

illustration.description: Seven soft pink stars create a gentle glow as Rio's papa, a man with short curly hair and kind brown eyes, quietly dims the nightlight. He wears a cozy blue sweater and moves carefully to keep everything peaceful. Rio watches sleepily from her crib.
illustration.alt: Papa dimming lights with seven quiet stars glowing

pages.text: Eight stars say dream time. Dream, dream!

illustration.description: Eight tiny twinkling stars surround Rio as her eyes finally close in peaceful sleep. She's curled up with her elephant under the rainbow blanket. Soft purple and blue tones fill the room, and a gentle smile shows she's having sweet dreams.
illustration.alt: Rio sleeping peacefully surrounded by eight dreaming stars

pages.text: Good night, little Rio. Sleep tight!

illustration.description: The entire night sky is filled with countless gentle stars of different sizes, all glowing softly over Rio's quiet house. She sleeps soundly in her crib while the stars watch over her. The scene is peaceful and serene with deep blues and soft silver highlights.
illustration.alt: Rio sleeping under a sky full of protective stars

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What does Rio hold while counting stars?
questions.explanation: Rio cuddles her favorite stuffed elephant throughout the story.

questions.question: How many stars say 'whisper'?
questions.explanation: Three stars say 'whisper, whisper' in the story.

questions.question: Who helps Rio get ready for bed?
questions.explanation: Both Mama and Papa help Rio during her bedtime routine.
